role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Acer, Quercus, turfgrass) and their ranges.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (curb-less asphalt) and housing standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural cues (vinyl siding, roof pitch) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing high-quality, image-grounded evidence. The meta agent's architectural analysis was particularly effective in distinguishing the US from other candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lawns, trees, and road width match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of deciduous trees and manicured lawns match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observation of curb-less asphalt and house styles matches the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Architectural details (vinyl siding, brick, garage) match the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the United States.
